Declares functions to check if a button is stuck or if the flash is broken.

# Purpose
This code is a C header file that declares two functions: [`is_button_stuck`](<#is_button_stuck>) and [`is_flash_broken`](<#is_flash_broken>). These functions return a `bool` value, indicating a true or false condition. The `#pragma once` directive ensures that the file is included only once in a single compilation, preventing duplicate definitions. The inclusion of `<stdbool.h>` allows the use of the `bool` data type, which is not natively available in C. This header file is likely used to check the status of a button and a flash component in a hardware or embedded system.
